betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Burner Press Preheater§f

§aReduce warm-up time for your burner press with this handy upgrade.§f

The §bBurner Press Preheater§f sits underneath the burner press and preheats it before operation. This dramatically reduces the time needed for the press to reach operating temperature.

§6Crafting§f:
Made from copper plates, lava, stone, and tungsten at a crafting table.

§6Placement§f:
Place the preheater directly beneath the burner press. It automatically connects and begins preheating.

§eTip§f: The preheater is especially useful when you only need a few items. Without it, the press spends most of its cycle warming up for small batches.
